query:
SELECT 
  draft_id,
  company,
  campaign,
  subject,
  status,
  LENGTH(body) as body_chars,
  LEFT(body, 150) as html_preview
FROM email_drafts 
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

  campaign,
  subject,

  LEFT(body, 150) as html_preview
